title: Move Item to Group when Custom Column Value Changes
excerpt: I have created a custom column called “Project Type”, which form-submitters fill, and I want my board to automatically  organize my items into the correct group based on this column. Currently board grouping automations …

posts.author: AnthonyStal (Anthony Arc'teryx)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created a custom column called “Project Type”, which form-submitters fill, and I want my board to automatically organize my items into the correct group based on this column. Currently board grouping automations are only permitted with 4 pre-determined column types (e.g. status and date).
